settings.heading: Track your order
settings.subtitle: Enter your order number and the email you ordered with. You will also have received a tracking number by email once your order shipped.

settings.heading: How to track your order
settings.content:
The quickest way to check your order is with the tracking link we send by email once your order ships. Open that link, or sign in and view your orders from your account, or enter your order number and email in the tracking widget on this page.

If your order has not arrived within the estimated window, message us on WhatsApp or email info@lightingsouq.com and we will investigate with the carrier on your behalf. You can also review our shipping and delivery policy or contact the team directly.
